headline: Bob's Discount Furniture shares are trading lower after the company reported mixed Q4 financial results.

headline: KB Home Posts Upbeat Q2 Sales, Joins Inmode, Icon And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Wednesday
summary: U.S. stocks rose, with Nasdaq up 50 points. KB Home (NYSE: KBH) reported strong Q2 results, shares jumped 16.2%. Other big gainers: WEN, ABSI, RUN, CCXI, ENRD, SFTX, ICCM, INMD, DFH.
